message:
feat(ui): add completion celebration system for successful builds

Introduces a celebration/summary UI component that displays after
successful compilation jobs, providing rich feedback to users.

New module: rch-common/src/ui/progress/celebrate.rs
- CompletionCelebration: Renders success banners with build metrics
- CelebrationSummary: Aggregates crates compiled, warnings, artifacts
- ArtifactSummary: Details about produced binaries/libraries
- Dynamic timing display (human-readable durations)
- Optional confetti/emoji mode for particularly fast builds
- Integrates with existing RchTheme for consistent styling

Dependencies:
- Added rand crate for celebration variety

This creates a more engaging user experience that rewards successful
builds with positive visual feedback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
